description: Trusted AP2 clients authorized to send signed envelopes to the Genesis agents gateway. Each entry holds a base64-encoded Ed25519 public key plus capability metadata. Read by the gateway's signature-verification middleware (forthcoming) to validate inbound X-AP2-Pubkey headers against this allowlist.

clients.name: Cato Agent Framework
clients.notes: Genesis agents client. Signs requests via vault-bound Ed25519 keypair (cato/vault_crypto.py).
